name: sessions/8371048452105557519
title: Automate Kaggle Kernel Execution and Golden Output Updates
prompt:
Working in the repo root (MasumRab/kaggle-notebooks-analysis):

Prerequisite: KAGGLE_API_TOKEN must be set as a Jules secret.

1. Push the house-prices pipeline notebook to Kaggle:
     python scripts/prepare_kaggle_push.py house-prices
     kaggle kernels push -p notebooks/house-prices/kaggle/

2. Poll until the kernel finishes (status: "complete" or "error"):
     kaggle kernels status criticalmaz/house-prices-pipeline
   Retry every 60 seconds, up to 30 attempts (~30 min timeout).

3. If status = "complete", pull the outputs:
     kaggle kernels output criticalmaz/house-prices-pipeline \
         -p qa_reports/house-prices/

4. Parse the output to extract actual golden values and update
   golden_outputs/house_prices.json with:
     - row_count, id_min, id_max, sale_price_min, sale_price_max, cv_rmse

5. Repeat for lanl (criticalmaz/lanl-pipeline).

6. Run golden tests to confirm they pass (not skipped):
     python -m pytest scripts/tests/test_house_prices_golden.py -v -m golden

7. Commit and push:
     git add golden_outputs/
     git commit -m "feat: populate golden output fixtures from Kaggle kernel runs"
     git push
